manifest.author: Songchen Tan
manifest.name: Note Synchronizer
manifest.description: This is a plugin for synchornizing Obsidian notes to other note-based softwares like Anki, following more strictly the principles of Zettelkasten and treating each Obsidian file as a note.

manifest.author: Sun Booshi
manifest.name: NoteToMP

manifest.name: Note to RED
manifest.description: Convert Markdown notes to RED (Xiaohongshu) style images

manifest.author: ste
manifest.name: Note Type

manifest.author: Valentin Pelletier

manifest.description: Automatically or manually generates Unique IDs (UUID, NanoID, ULID, or Snowflake) for notes and registers them in metadata (frontmatter).

manifest.author: david4liu
manifest.name: Knowledge AI
manifest.description: AI for your vault: grounded RAG chat with citations, hybrid (BM25 + vector + summary) retrieval, multi-format indexing (MD/PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX), image OCR/Vision, and artifact generation (summaries, study guides, timelines, mind maps, slide decks).

manifest.author: ayv4zyan
manifest.name: NotebookLM Mindmap to Canvas
manifest.description: Convert NotebookLM mindmaps to Canvas with one click. Requires NotebookLM Ultra Exporter Chrome extension.

manifest.author: Johan Sanneblad
manifest.name: Notebook Navigator
manifest.description: Replace the default file explorer with a clean two-pane interface featuring folder tree, tag browsing, file previews, keyboard navigation, drag-and-drop, pinned notes, and customizable display options.

manifest.author: kiluahh
manifest.name: Notebrain
manifest.description: AI Agent inside your notes. Press Mod+Shift+Enter to chat with DeepSeek directly in any note.

manifest.author: Philemon Chiro

manifest.description: Browse your vault as a Google Keep-style masonry of cards. Quick capture, pin, color, archive, and filter notes by labels — sticky-note style.

manifest.author: Joaquim Frances
manifest.name: Notelert
manifest.description: Creates Notelert reminders from note lines using the Android app and Firebase scheduling.

manifest.author: jacob
manifest.name: Notemd
manifest.description: Enhances notes using LLMs: 1) Processes text to add [[wiki-links]] and create concept notes. 2) Performs web research (Tavily/DuckDuckGo) and summarizes topics. 3) Generates content from note titles. 4) Translates notes/selections. 5) build powerful knowledge graphs Supports multiple LLM providers and customizable output.

manifest.author: Dave Shepard
manifest.name: NotePack
manifest.description: Scans your vault's markdown files for unchecked todos and collates them in a todos sidebar. Supports @mention for team members and natural language due date logic.

manifest.author: AyushParkara
manifest.name: NotePix
manifest.description: Automatically uploads images to your public or private GitHub repository, replacing local links with the corresponding remote URLs

manifest.author: Travis Cochran
manifest.name: Notes Calendar

manifest.author: kharbacheuski
manifest.name: Notes Dashboard

manifest.author: Paul Treanor
